markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to explore a potential content marketing partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Mismatch:** Maxima seeks deep, proprietary thought leadership for a conservative finance audience, while GrowthX's model is high-volume SEO/GEO content (5 articles/week) to build domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [**GrowthX's AI Process:** An agentic AI workflow creates content, but human editors are in-the-loop at every stage (briefing, drafting, fact-checking) to ensure quality and brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [**Pricing:** A two-phase model: a one-time $30k 8-week strategy sprint (incl. 5-10 articles) followed by a $15k/month retainer for 12 months.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [**Decision:** Raniz will proceed with an SEO consultant for initial research and reconnect in January to discuss a potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)

## Topics

### Maxima's GTM & Content Strategy

  - [**Company:** Maxima, a Series A AI-native alternative for financial close & consolidation.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**GTM Motion:** Top-down, sales-led enterprise/mid-market sales to a conservative finance audience (Controllers, VPs of Accounting).](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [**Content Goal:** Differentiate from legacy vendors (e.g., Blackline) with high-quality, proprietary thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Avoid generic content easily copied by competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [**Model:** Emulate Zip HQ's focus on deep guides and whitepapers.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Initial Plan:** Use an SEO consultant for research, then hire SMEs for high-value content and an intern for blog/newsletter execution.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Driven Content Model

  - [**Core Service:** End-to-end SEO/GEO content creation to build domain authority and rank in search/LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Process:** An agentic AI workflow with human oversight at each stage.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
    1.  [**Context Artifacts:** Create detailed profiles (personas, brand voice, product) to guide the AI.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
    2.  **Brief Generation:** AI analyzes SERPs and competitor content to create a brief.
          - [**Human Role:** Editors can modify the brief before drafting.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
    3.  **Drafting & Refinement:** AI drafts content, which is then evaluated for groundedness, brand alignment, and audience focus.
          - [**Human Role:** Editors review, accept, or modify AI suggestions.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
    4.  **Fact-Checking:** AI validates every passage against deep research.
          - [**Human Role:** Editors can accept or rewrite AI suggestions.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [**Team Structure:** A dedicated 3-person team for each client: Managing Director (strategy), Managing Editor (writing), and Content Manager (execution).](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)

### Pricing & Engagement Model

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint**](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
      - [**Duration:** 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [**Cost:** $30,000 (one-time fee)](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** A content roadmap and 5–10 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [**Terms:** Client can opt out before Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution**](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
      - [**Duration:** 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
      - [**Cost:** $15,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** 5 articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Raniz:** Proceed with the current SEO consultant for initial research and strategy. Reconnect with Tyler in January to discuss a potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Follow up with Raniz in January.](https://fathom.video/share/Hmw4nniprX7hHszmxe2tVKPHCkSQ_Vx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
